Translations.ViewLatest: View the latest information about this **{0}**.
Translations.Status_UpToDate: `🟩 UP TO DATE` -# *This file is **up to date** {0}.*
Translations.Status_OutOfDate: `⚠️ OUTDATED` -# *This file is **not** up to date and is built for {0}*
Translations.LCPDFRVersionNote: -# *This is the version listed on the LCPDFR.com file page.*
Translations.FileVersionNote: -# *This is the version listed by the file in the RagePluginHook log.*
Translations.Btn_GetDMUpdates: Get DM Updates on this file!
Translations.DetailsFetching: Requesting complete file details from LCPDFR.com...
Translations.DetailsAlreadyPresent: Complete details are already available for this file.
Translations.DetailsFetchComplete: Complete details have been fetched and stored.
Translations.DetailsFetchFailed: Failed to fetch complete file details. Please try again.
Translations.DetailsOwnerOnly: Only the user who ran this command can press this sync button.
